scripts.dev: pnpm run build && pnpm run start
scripts.build:exe: esbuild local-server.mjs --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --outfile=dist/local-server.cjs --external:sqlite3 && esbuild tracker-client.mjs --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --outfile=dist/tracker-client.cjs && npx pkg dist/local-server.cjs --targets node18-win-x64 --output bin/tracker-service.exe && npx pkg dist/tracker-client.cjs --targets node18-win-x64 --output bin/tracker-client.exe
